name: Baking Powder Biscuits II
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and measure it out.
2. Cut in the shortening using two spatulas until combined.
3. Add the milk to the mixture and stir until a dough forms.
4. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured board.
5. Knead the dough gently, then pat into a flat sheet about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Use a floured cutter to cut out biscuits.
7. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 12 minutes.
16 servings. The Household Searchlight - 1941
